  "findings": [
    "Personnel observed working directly under a suspended load",
    "No indication of tag lines or physical barriers to control the load",
    "Crane operator's line of sight potentially obstructed or spotter not visible"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop all work and clear the area under the suspended load",
    "Establish an exclusion zone with physical barriers and signage",
    "Ensure tag lines are used to control the load and personnel remain in clear view of the operator",
    "Conduct a safety stand-down to review OSHA 1926.1425 requirements with the crew"
  ],
  "rationale": "Working under a suspended load is a critical violation of OSHA 1926.1425. The load could fall or shift unexpectedly, leading to fatal crushing injuries. Immediate cessation of work and implementation of exclusion zones are required.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.1425 (Keeping clear of the load)"
  ]
}
